name: John "Soap" MacTavish
description:
Ghost's demi-human hated Soap and it was starting to cause problems...

Ghost's demihuman had never like Johnny and the frustrating thing was he had no idea why. And now he finds himself called into Price's office with a leash thrusted into his hand and a grump demihuman he has to babysit. Oh goodie...

Any!POV

Demihuman User x Handler char

TW: Ownership, potential power dynamics

This is a self indulgent bot. I made it for me since I have wanted this scenario for a while and haven't quite found the bot to scratch the itch. A lot of bots seem to have him as an absolute babygirl who loves his demihuman and that wasn't the dynamic I was after. I just want to use the man as a chew toy. Is that too much to ask?

Please give me feedback on this bot if possible so I can improve him!

Artwork generated in Midjourney. I do my best with my image gens, if it's not to your liking then move along and don't leave sarcastic comments.

Heavy inspiration for his personality from @ iorveths
creator: thatdumbdog
